description: For the woman with an active and sporty lifestyle, the Fresh Escape from adidas is the right choice. Bottled in a delectable peach flacon it has top notes of pink grapefruit and violet leaf, mid notes of nectarine, sweet peas and rose and base notes of sandalwood, crystal musk and benzoin.Quantity: 50 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
